claim_results.claim: **POF 2828 | May 2, 2026 | Required reading before any framework work** **Version 1.0 — The Argument from Axiom to Evidence to Boundary** ---
Those layers describe the STRUCTURE of the equation — what the variables are, what they mean, how to teach them.
The logic chain that connects axiom to equation to evidence to boundary.
Theophysics is the claim that this gap is unnecessary.
The same mathematical structure governs both domains because both domains are measurements of the same underlying reality. ---
The further claim: this isomorphism is not coincidence.
The equation doesn't bridge two separate realities.
Nothing is claimed below it. **Axiom 1: God-as-Axiom.** The equation requires a terminal ground — an uncaused cause that is not itself a product of the system.

This is the same structural role an axiom plays in any formal system: it is not proven within the system because the system cannot exist without it. **Axiom 2: Trinity Isomorphism.** The equation's structure maps to a triune architecture: a ground state (Father), a projection operator (Son), and an actualization field (Spirit).
The isomorphism is architectural, not argumentative. **Axiom 3: Free Will.** The alignment factor M ∈ [-1, 1] requires genuine choice.
If M is deterministic, the equation collapses to a fixed trajectory and the coherence integral becomes trivial — it computes a predetermined outcome.
The equation is only non-trivial when M represents genuine agency.
It is a mathematical requirement for the equation to do anything interesting.
These three — God-as-axiom, Trinity isomorphism, free will — are the formal boundary established February 14, 2026.
### Definition 10: The Ten Factors The Master Equation integrates ten typed factors.

None may be added, removed, renamed, or merged. | # | Symbol | Domain | What It Is | |---|--------|--------|------------| | 1 | G | ℝ≥0 | External negentropy influx rate | | 2 | M | [-1, 1] | Alignment cosine between system state and reference vector | | 3 | E | ℝ≥0 | Signal propagation fidelity (channel capacity) | | 4 | S_prod | ℝ≥0 | Entropy production rate (enters product as S_eff) | | 5 | T | ℝ>0 | Temporal integration parameter | | 6 | K | ℝ≥0 | Information compression ratio | | 7 | R | {0, 1} | Phase transition indicator (irreversible state change) | | 8 | Q | [0, 1] | Superposition measure (unresolved state space) | | 9 | F | [0, 1] | Non-local correlation strength (entanglement) | | 10 | C | [0, 1] | Total integration measure (global coherence) |

This is where the isomorphism claim lives. | # | Factor | Physical Reading | Spiritual Reading | Core Isomorphism | |---|--------|-----------------|-------------------|-----------------| | 1 | G | Open-system thermodynamics: coherence requires external negentropy influx | Grace: spiritual coherence requires external grace; reception depends on alignment state | Closed systems decay.
Global coherence measure. | Christ / Logos: the integrating principle.
Seven properties of the Master Equation are formally proven in the companion Lean 4 kernel: 1. **Antitone entropy.** S_eff is antitone in S_prod.
2. **Zero collapse (numeric).** If any of G, M, E, T, K, Q, F, C = 0, then χ_local = 0.
3. **Zero collapse (phase gate).** If R = 0, then χ_local = 0 regardless of other factors.

Two factors intentionally break symmetry: **Factor 9 (F — Weak Force / Moral Conservation) is directional.** It does not have symmetric constructive/destructive duality inside the same equation the way factors 1-8 do.
Noether's theorem guarantees moral conservation is non-optional.
There is no anti-Christ in the equation; there is only the absence of Christ, which is decoherence.
The equation will not close without them.
They are what the equation demands.
- **Genesis Decoherence Curve:** Pre-flood lifespans fit an exponential decoherence model at R² > 0.8.
The floor is nonzero, which requires an open system (grace). - **Evolution Audit:** Standard neo-Darwinian parameters solved backward yield 3 of 7 values outside physically possible range.
The Master Equation's coherence field — unchanged, never tuned for biology — brings all parameters within or approaching range.
They are evidence at the statistical threshold used for discovery in particle physics (5σ).
The framework PREDICTS these effects.
If T bifurcated completely, the equation would close.
A closed equation is a closed system.
This is Gödelian: the system is consistent BECAUSE it is incomplete at exactly this point.
Silence here IS the signal. **The Feb 14 Floor.** The formal proof establishes God-as-axiom, Trinity isomorphism, and free will.
The Master Equation is not an arbitrary product of ten factors.

Isolating each variable and solving for it produces the natural equation of its domain: - Isolate K → Shannon's channel capacity equation - Isolate Q → Schrödinger equation (superposition dynamics) - Isolate E → Modified Friedmann equation (cosmological evolution) - Isolate S → Second Law of Thermodynamics - Isolate G → Open-system thermodynamic equation with source term - And so on for each factor This is the Prism Argument: one white light (the Master Equation) separates into the spectrum of known physics when passed through the prism of isolation.
The individual equations of physics are projections of a single coherence equation.
This is testable — if any factor, when isolated, does NOT produce its expected natural equation, the framework fails at that point. ---

If the structural isomorphism is real, then substituting spiritual variables into physics equations must preserve ALL of: 1. **Topology** — same mathematical structure 2. **Falloff behavior** — same decay/growth patterns 3. **Boundary conditions** — same limits and constraints 4. **Conservation laws** — same conserved quantities If the structure breaks ANYWHERE under substitution, the framework fails at that point.
Before publishing any claim, applying any interpretation, or extending the framework: 1.
Does the claim reduce to a Layer 2 pairing? (physical-theological bridge) 2.
If all three pass, the claim is consistent.

It gives you the full argument in one pass. **Writing a paper?** Pull from Sections 4-5 (equation and bridge table) and cite Section 9 (evidence). **Facing a hostile reviewer?** Point to Section 6 (Lean-verified properties) and Section 13 (falsification test). **Extending the framework?** Apply Section 14 (three-layer test) to every new claim before accepting it. **Confused about what's settled vs uncertain?** Section 10 draws the line explicitly. --- *Theophysics Research Initiative | POF 2828* *Formal Theory v1.0 | May 2, 2026* *This document is the argument.
